data_type_note.logic: For each Quest product, the script builds multiple Amazon Catalog API queries from SKU, manufacturer, product name, description, and model numbers. It merges all ASIN candidates, scores them, fetches SP-API product details and pricing, then returns up to 5 competitors per product.
data_type_note.coverage_behavior: If fewer than 5 candidates pass MIN_MATCH_SCORE, the script still includes the best fallback candidates so more SKUs get competitor results.
data_type_note.competitor_name: Competitor name is taken from Amazon Catalog brand/manufacturer. Buy Box seller ID is returned separately from SP-API Pricing.
data_type_note.match_score: Score uses 35% title similarity, 30% word overlap, 25% SKU/model match, and 10% brand/manufacturer match.
data_type_note.buy_box_price: Buy Box / featured offer price from SP-API.
data_type_note.units_sold: Amazon SP-API does not provide competitor units sold.

Other features include: -The ability to rotate your light up to 60 degrees.
-A headband that you can adjust to fit a variety of head shapes and sizes. -Waterproof wire and a waterproof switch, so you don’t have to worry about spills or sudden showers when you use your LED head light in soggy conditions. -Quality wiring designed to resist the kind of dangerous, inefficient electrical leakage that might shorten your LED head lamp’s lifespan. -Convenient digital display that let's you know when you're getting low on battery charge, stop guessing or worrying about when it will run out. -Don't worry about bringing batteries with you wherever your LED head light goes: this is a rechargeable head lamp, so just carry your charger along and you'll be set! competitors.matched_amazon_product_title: HALT II DOG REPELLENT SPRAY Repeller 1.5 oz Stop Agressive Dog Attack BIKE BICYCLE
competitors.description: A squirt of HALT II Dog Repellent into the face of a vicious dog stops him in his tracks. HALT II is temporarily painful, but medically safe. Effects of the spray usually wear off in a few minutes. Pressure-packed aerosol shoots streams up to 10 feet (3 meter). HALT II Dog Repellent canister clips onto belt or pocket. 1.5-oz. canister. Who knows more about dog attacks than the mailman? So what do the experts use to repel dog attacks? Well, the U.S. Postal Service has been using Halt II Dog Repellent since 1966. You might say they have been conducting field tests for over thirty years. Halt II products use Capsaicin, a naturally occurring extract of peppers, which, when sprayed in a dog's face, causes only temporary, but extreme discomfort for the dog. Think of it as attitude re-adjustment. Halt II stops him in his tracks, giving you time to move out of danger. Halt II's pressurized spray is accurate up to 10 feet. The attack is interrupted and the animal is distracted from the object of its aggression, thus giving valuable seconds to help the user retreat to a safe place.
bullet_points: Accurate up to 10 feet (3 meter)
Carry when cycling, running, or walking; ideal for kennel staff and mail carriers
Stops dog in his tracks
Distracts animal from the object of its aggression, giving valuable seconds to help the user retreat to a safe place
Clips onto belt or pocket.

competitors.description:
Venture into the wild with confidence using Ben's 100 Tick & Insect Repellent. Our powerful spray is specifically crafted to offer you the ultimate protection from ticks and other biting insects, ensuring your outdoor excursions are uninterrupted. With its potent DEET-based formula, this mosquito repellent spray provides a formidable shield, repelling everything from mosquitoes to ticks, allowing you to focus on the adventure at hand.

This travel size mosquito repellent comes in a conveniently compact 3.4 fl oz bottle, making it the ideal companion for any outdoor enthusiast. The travel size bug spray easily fits into your backpack or pocket, ensuring that wherever you roam, you're never without defense. The insect repellent pump spray design makes application a breeze, so you can quickly get back to the joys of hiking, camping, and exploring.

Ben's lightweight insect repellent pump spray also won't weigh you down as you scale peaks or trek through forests. And you'll have long-lasting protection for up to 10 hours, providing peace of mind as you immerse yourself in nature's splendor.

Crafted and tested in the heart of the White Mountains in New Hampshire, Ben's insect repellent is more than just a product; it's a testament to our commitment to outdoor enthusiasts. We understand that nature's beauty comes with its challenges, which is why our formula is tested in one of the toughest bug territories around. So whether you're fishing by a quiet stream or scaling rugged peaks, you can count on Ben's 100 Tick & Insect Repellent to keep those pesky insects at bay, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the adventure at hand.

Remember, the great outdoors is a playground for the bold and the brave. With Ben's by your side, you're not just prepared; you're invincible against the winged nuisances that lurk in the wild. So go ahead, pack your bags, and don't forget your trusty bottle of Ben's?your ultimate bug spray!

competitors.description: A squirt of HALT II Dog Repellent into the face of a vicious dog stops him in his tracks. HALT II is temporarily painful, but medically safe. Effects of the spray usually wear off in a few minutes. Pressure-packed aerosol shoots streams up to 10 feet (3 meter). HALT II Dog Repellent canister clips onto belt or pocket. 1.5-oz. canister. Who knows more about dog attacks than the mailman? So what do the experts use to repel dog attacks? Well, the U.S. Postal Service has been using Halt II Dog Repellent since 1966. You might say they have been conducting field tests for over thirty years. Halt II products use Capsaicin, a naturally occurring extract of peppers, which, when sprayed in a dog's face, causes only temporary, but extreme discomfort for the dog. Think of it as attitude re-adjustment. Halt II stops him in his tracks, giving you time to move out of danger. Halt II's pressurized spray is accurate up to 10 feet. The attack is interrupted and the animal is distracted from the object of its aggression, thus giving valuable seconds to help the user retreat to a safe place.

competitors.description:
400-Pack Heavy Duty Black Zip Ties - Assorted Sizes (8", 10", 12", 14")

Engineered for long-lasting performance, these zip ties combine industrial-grade durability with versatile size options to tackle any securing or organizing task with confidence.

Ultra-Durable Construction You Can Trust

Crafted from premium nylon 66—renowned for its strength and resilience—these zip ties boast an impressive 50LBS tensile strength. This robust build ensures they stand up to heavy use without compromising, resisting snaps and breaks even under consistent stress. Designed to withstand the test of time, they maintain their integrity through daily wear and tear, making them a reliable choice for both occasional and frequent use.

4 Assorted Sizes for Every Task

With 400 pieces across 4 carefully selected sizes, you’ll always have the perfect length for the job:

  • 8-inch plastic ties: cable ties for cords (HDMI, power cables), wreath making supplies, DIY projects, small PVC pipes.
  • 10-inch strong zip ties: strong zip ties for garden hoses/sprinklers (garden supplies), home theater cables, machinery maintenance.
  • 12-inch durable cable ties: heavy duty cable ties for fencing mesh, chicken wire, pool hoses, workshop cords (welding/power saw).
  • 14-inch durable cable ties: heavy duty cable ties for oversized furniture, cargo securing, industrial hoses, construction materials (pipes/lumber).

Once in place, their secure locking mechanism ensures a tight hold that won’t loosen over time, keeping your items organized and secured exactly as you need them.

All-Weather Reliability

Built to perform in extreme conditions, these zip ties handle temperatures from -40°F to 185°F with ease. Their UV-resistant formula prevents degradation from prolonged sun exposure, making them equally effective indoors and outdoors—whether you’re securing camping gear, tying back garden plants, or organizing under-the-hood automotive components.

Sleek & Simple to Use

The professional black finish resists fading, maintaining a clean look in any setting. Applying them is quick and tool-free: just thread the tip through the locking head, pull tight, and the secure grip takes hold instantly.

For Every Need

From DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople to homeowners tidying up, these durable, multi-sized zip ties deliver the strength and versatility to get the job done right—every time.

Multi-Purpose & Indoor-Outdoor Use: Ideal for home improvement, automotive work, both indoors and outdoors. Use as cable ties for cords, plant ties, or to secure gear. A must-have for mechanics and DIYers.

Weather & Temperature Resistant: Made to handle tough conditions, with UV resistance and ability to work in temperatures from -40°F to 185°F. Great for outdoor tools, prefab cabin kits, and long-term outdoor jobs.​
Easy to Use & Strong: Equipped with a straightforward locking design. Just thread the end through the head, pull to tighten, and it locks securely—no extra tools required.

competitors.description:
Surround gate valve handles and prevent them from being turned with ACCUFORM SIGNS STOPOUT Gate Valve Lockouts. Get assurance that the valve handles will stay in the desired 'closed' or 'open' position. The design of the STOPOUT Gate Valve Lockout's hinged clamshell housing fully encloses the valve handle and prevents unauthorized access. The tough thermoplastic, polypropylene device is a bright hazard red color, and features a durable, impact-resistant aluminum hinge with permanent binding pin. Shackle holes secure with up to 3 padlocks (sold separately).

About ACCUFORM SIGNS:

ACCUFORM SIGNS manufactures visual communications systems for facilities and the workplace. Our products include almost every type of safety sign, tag, and label, as well as an extensive line of Lockout/Tagout products. Accuform is widely considered the leading facility safety identification manufacturer in North America and beyond. For nearly 40 years, ACCUFORM SIGNS, headquartered in Brooksville, Florida, has continuously perfected and improved sign, tag and label manufacturing processes, safety procedures, environmental compliance, and distribution strategies to deliver world-class visual communications to the workplace that protect, inform, and motivate the global workforce.

competitors.matched_amazon_product_title: Sentry Air Systems, Inc. 18” Portable Clean Room – Laminar Flow Hood for medical and laboratory uses. Positive-pressure workspace meets ISO Class 5 Standards. Supplies Filtered Air to the Workspace
competitors.description:
ISO Class 5 Cleanroom Environment: The 18” Wide Portable Clean Room Hood creates a compact and reduced particulate benchtop enclosure. This vertical laminar flow hood is rated an ISO Class 5 clean room cabinet and utilizes a dual-stage filtration process that filters ambient air through a pre-filter and main filter in order to supply filtered air to the enclosed workspace.

High Quality Filtration Choices: The main filter is typically either a HEPA or ULPA filter depending on the efficiency desired. The HEPA filter is up to 99.97% efficient on particles 0.3 microns and larger, while the ULPA filter is up to 99.9995% efficient on particles 0.12 microns and larger.

Useful for a Variety of Applications: This portable clean room hood has been utilized in variety of applications, including stem cell therapy practices and other medical applications, tissue culturing, data recovery, cleaning processes, portable field testing, manufacturing, and much more.

Compact, Portable, and Reliable: The 18” Wide Portable Clean Room Hood can be easily integrated with existing laboratory or working space because of its small size and portable nature. This system also features energy-efficiency and quiet and low maintenance operation.

Includes:
Clear anti-static vinyl curtains
LED Light Kit
(1) Pre-Filter – MERV 8 efficiency rating
(1) HEPA Filter – Up to 99.97% effective on particles 0.3 microns and larger



How do Portable Clean Rooms Work?

1. A powerful fan pulls in ambient air into the filtration system.

2. The MERV 8 Pre-Filter processes and captures some of the particles from the ambient air.

3. The main filter filters the air removing particulate down to 0.3 microns for HEPA filters and 0.12 microns for ULPA filters.

competitors.description: The SAFM Air Filter is a Coalescing Filter with a 0.1 Micron fiber element. A coalescing filter functions differently from a standard particulate filter: air flows to the inside of the element then outward through a coalescing media. SAFM Coalescing filters are used for high filtration of oil aerosols and sub-micron particles. They are often used with critical instrumentation; Paint Spraying equipment; highly sophisticated air systems; blow molding processes; applications in food industry; and Clean Room environments. This Coalescing Filter offers general industrial filtration with low pressure drop and long element life. It is often used with older compressor models where downstream oil carryover is excessive and longer element life and low pressure drop are a concern. For maximum performance and efficiency, coalescing filters should be preceded by our Particulate filters. *** We recommend using an SAF Series Filter (B00CTEOC7C) as a preliminary filter ahead of this unit to prevent premature clogging. Please visit our Amazon Store for our complete line of air products. DO NOT INSTALL A POLYCARBONATE BOWL IN PRESSURES THAT EXCEED 150 PSI OR WHERE THERE IS A PRESENCE OF SOLVENTS HARMFUL TO POLYCARBONATE.

competitors.description: Our CO Aircraft and Vehicle CO Detector has undergone significant improvements in version 2.0 (FD-CAR002) compared to our previous version, FD-CAR001. The new version boasts brighter LED alarms, a soft rubber touch feel, a larger LCD display, and a key ring for battery replacement. With the FD-CAR002, low levels of CO detection are possible, preventing CO exposure from exhaust leaks or polluted air entering the vehicle. This feature ensures that you can have peace of mind and take preventative care to avoid headaches, nausea, and fatigue. The FORENSICS carbon monoxide detector was designed with "reliability and ease of use" in mind, making it ideal for pilots or aircraft and helicopters, police, truck drivers, vehicle owners, emergency vehicles, train drivers, UBER, fleet vehicles, personal vehicle operation, and personal protection for travel. The CO alarms are set at 9 ppm with red LED and 25 ppm with an audible buzzer sound (70 dB) to ensure maximum protection. These alarm levels were chosen based on recommendations from the World Health Organization (WHO), Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), American Society of Heating, Refrigerating, and Air-Conditioning Engineers (ASHRAE), and American Conference of Governmental Industrial Hygienists (ACGIH). The CO alarm includes smart detection algorithms designed in the USA, a high-quality sensor made in Japan, and a product assembled in the PRC. The small, modern, aluminum-alloy body gives a real "metal finish" high-quality touch at only 2 oz. It comes with a robust case and a 3M stick-on mount option. Unlike regular CO alarms for the home, which are too slow and alert in 60 to 240 minutes over 70 ppm, the FD-CAR002 is designed to detect CO levels at an early stage, preventing fatigue and drowsiness from leading to accidents.
bullet_points: 🚗 USES: Exhaust leaks in aircraft, vehicles, school buses, trucks, and fleet vehicles. Gas exposure can trigger headaches, nausea, and fatigue.
🔬ACCURATE: CO low-level alarm at 9 ppm & 25 ppm according to WHO, EPA, ASHRAE, OSHA, and NIOSH recommended exposure levels.
🔔 FAST ALARMS: Alarms at > 9 ppm in 60 secs, compared to home CO detectors that only alarm > 70 ppm in 60 - 240 minutes. Bright LED and buzzer alarms.
👫 EASY USE: Continuous 8-12 month operation with the same batteries. Easy one button operation. Small form factor (2oz), tick-on mount.

competitors.matched_amazon_product_title: Sentinel 170 Low-Odor Mastic Remover – VOC-Compliant Clear Liquid Adhesive Remover, 5 Gallons for Black Vinyl Tile Mastic & Subfloor Preparation
competitors.description:
When preparing floors for renovation, tile removal, or subfloor restoration, choose a product that works efficiently yet respects indoor air quality: the Sentinel 170 Low-Odor Mastic Remover delivers both. This VOC-compliant, low-odor adhesive remover is specifically formulated for the challenging task of removing black mastic beneath 9-inch and 12-inch vinyl floor tile—an adhesive notoriously difficult to lift.
In a convenient 5-gallon pail, the clear liquid can be applied via spray, mop, or squeegee. After a 10-20 minute dwell time, the softened adhesive is scraped or agitated and removed, then the substrate is rinsed and allowed to dry before further floor installation. With an estimated coverage of 75-100 sq ft per gallon depending on conditions, the product is designed for cost-effective large-scale jobs.
Sentinel 170 is ideal for abatement professionals, flooring contractors, and renovation teams working in occupied or semi-occupied buildings where odor control and compliance with air-quality regulations matter. Its performance on black mastic makes it a critical tool for subfloor prep before new floor systems are installed.
bullet_points: LOW ODOR FORMULA – Designed for use in occupied spaces while removing black mastic under 9”/12” vinyl floor tile.
VOC-COMPLIANT PERFORMANCE – Contains less than 5% VOC content by weight in compliance with CARB and OTC regulations.
FAST-ACTING LIQUID – Apply by spray or mop, allow soak 10-20 minutes, then scrape or squeegee adhesive residue.
COVERAGE & EFFICIENCY – Covers approximately 75-100 sq ft per gallon depending on substrate and mastic thickness.
TAILORED FOR BLACK MASTIC – Especially effective for the removal of black adhesive mastic commonly found beneath vinyl tiles.

Quest Barrierwear

Featuring SMMS construction, serged seams, reinforced impact areas and elastic cuffs, our disposable coveralls are designed to meet real world standards when only the most durable protective apparel will stand up. Versatile enough as a painter suit, hazmat suit, chemical suit or lab coveralls, our disposable coveralls provide you with a comfortable yet sturdy fit which doesn’t lose form.

When you need maximum breathability and freedom of movement, our lightweight hazmat suits are made of microporous laminated materials for optimal comfort—no matter what situation you’re in. competitors.matched_amazon_product_title: Quest Protective Apparel Cut Resistant Work Gloves (ANSI A1) – Lightweight Graphene Gloves for Gardening,DIY,Mechanical & General Handling – Breathable Grip Gloves for Men & Women – Medium, Case of 72
competitors.description: Quest Protective Apparel Cut and Puncture Resistant Work Gloves are designed for light-duty mechanical protection where comfort, grip, and breathability matter most. These gloves feature a 15-gauge Kyorene graphene fiber liner paired with a MicroFoam nitrile palm coating, delivering reliable grip, lightweight strength, and all-day comfort for general handling tasks. They are ANSI A1 rated for cut resistance and EN388 4121A certified for mechanical protection, making them suitable for activities such as gardening, landscaping, DIY projects, light mechanical work, warehouse handling, and everyday use. They are not intended for high-risk cut environments, heavy industrial applications, or use near open blades, grinders, or lathes. The graphene liner supports thermal regulation, odor neutralization, and bacteriostatic properties, helping hands stay fresher and more comfortable during extended wear. The breathable construction enhances airflow and dexterity but is not waterproof; these gloves perform best in dry or mildly damp conditions and are not designed for prolonged water exposure. They are not specifically rated for chemical protection and should not be used for chemical handling, where chemically certified gloves are required. Care instructions: the gloves are machine washable; wash between 40°C–60°C (104–140°F) with mild detergent and keep drying temperatures below 70°C (158°F)—light surface felting during drying may occur and does not affect performance. Durability and replacement depend on task type, usage frequency, and care; gloves should be replaced when visible wear, holes, loss of grip, or material damage appears. Designed for reusable, light-duty applications, these gloves prioritize comfort and control over heavy-duty abrasion or puncture resistance. Each pack includes three pairs in the selected size with an ambidextrous fit for consistent performance across general work applications.
bullet_points: Light Cut Protection for Everyday Tasks: ANSI A1 cut resistance provides light protection for general handling, gardening, DIY projects, mechanical work, and light industrial tasks where comfort and dexterity matter.
Kyorene Graphene Fiber Construction: Features a lightweight 15-gauge Kyorene graphene liner designed for strength, flexibility, thermal regulation, and long-wear comfort without bulk.
Secure Grip with Breathable Comfort: MicroFoam nitrile palm coating delivers reliable grip and dexterity while the breathable liner helps reduce heat buildup during extended use.
Odor-Neutralizing, Bacteriostatic Design: Graphene fiber helps reduce odor and bacterial buildup, keeping gloves fresher and more comfortable throughout the workday.

Certified Mechanical Protection: Rated ANSI A1 for cut resistance and EN388 4121A for mechanical performance. Designed for light-duty applications; not intended for open blades, grinders, lathes, or chemical handling.
Machine Washable for Easy Care: Machine washable at 40–60°C (104–140°F) with mild detergent. Dry at temperatures not exceeding 70°C (158°F).

Ensure that the swab has enough saliva to initiate the test, as it must be completely saturated with the saliva specimen. The oral cube will then do the work getting the oral saliva specimen from the swab to the detection chamber, and results will follow. competitors.matched_amazon_product_title: Prime Screen [5 Pack] 6 Panel Oral Saliva Drug Test Kit, Employment and Insurance Testing (AMP, COC, MET, OPI, PCP, THC) - ODOA-166
competitors.description:
Prime Screen 6 Panel Oral Saliva Test Kit (AMP, COC, MET, OPI, PCP, THC) - ODOA-166

Our 6 Panel saliva test kits are a quick and reliable method for detecting some of the most commonly abused substances - AMP, COC, MET, OPI, PCP, THC. Oral fluid drug tests are able to be administered under close supervision which makes it virtually impossible to attempt any type of concealed tampering. Making them a great option if there has been frequent occurrences of suspected adulteration attempts.

  • Easy, Convenient and Accurate Results in Minutes
  • Color Indicator for Adequate Saliva Collection
  • No Need for Restroom, Avoids shy bladder issues
  • Observed Collections Make Drug Test Results Hard to Adulterate
  • Citric Taste on Collector Help Donor to Stimulate Saliva Production

 

Important: Be sure that the swab is fully saturated with saliva (saturation indicator turns red) before placing it into the screening device. Please note that the color intensity of the lines in the detection window is not in any way correlated with the amount of the drug present.
bullet_points: Instantly Detect 6 DOA Substances: AMP, COC, MET, OPI, PCP, THC. Employment and Insurance Testing (E&I).

Color Indicator for Adequate Saliva Collection: Make sure the saturated indicator turns RED when collecting oral fluid. It may take up to 7 min. Tilt the sponge downward when collecting oral fluid. (Gravity will help the sample collect faster!)
No Need for Restroom: Avoid shy bladder issues.
Prevent Specimen Adulteration, Collect and Test in One Step: Administer collections under close supervision make test results hard to adulterate.
Citric Taste on Collector: Help donor to stimulate saliva production.

competitors.description: MOLLIS Disposable Period Underwear is designed for all-day heavy flow absorption, making it an essential choice for night-time care during the first few days of menstruation and postpartum recovery. Combining the features of oversized menstrual pads and regular underwear, it offers superior absorbency, capable of holding liquid equivalent to 4 pads. The 5-layer absorbent core securely locks in liquid, preventing backflow and ensuring maximum protection. Made from non-woven fabric, it is ultra-thin, breathable, and incredibly soft, providing a silky-smooth and comfortable experience that feels like real underwear . With its fully elastic design, 5x stretchable waistband, extra-long absorbent core, and raised leakproof side edges, it offers a perfect fit and reliable protection against leaks, even when you roll over during sleep. Each pair is individually wrapped for convenience and hygiene, and the core ensures a peace of mind experience.

competitors.description: Start your day with calm and control using the Sunrise Alarm Clock, crafted for adults who value better mornings and restful sleep. This smart alarm clock simulates a natural sunrise with 20 gradual brightness levels to gently wake you - ideal for deep sleepers, shift workers, and wellness-focused adults. Create your perfect sleep environment with 30 built-in sleep sounds, including white noise, pink noise, brown noise, rainfall, ocean waves, and birdsong. Whether you're unwinding at night or blocking out distractions, this sound machine enhances relaxation and supports deep, uninterrupted sleep. Personalize your room's ambiance with 12 light colors and 20 adjustable brightness, from warm nightlight settings to bright daylight simulation - ideal for bedrooms, home offices, or shared living spaces. Choose from 10 unique alarm tones that suit your preference - whether you want a gentle melody or a firmer sound to stay on schedule. The touch control light and easy-turn spiral knob let you adjust lights, sounds, and alarm times effortlessly. Its modern wood-grain finish fits beautifully into adult bedroom décor, providing a functional yet elegant upgrade to traditional alarm clocks. Ideal for anyone prioritizing natural sleep, gentle wakeups.

Touch Control & Easy Operation: The simple touch control and intuitive spiral knob make it easy to adjust light, sound, and alarms. No app required, ensuring stress-free use for all ages. Perfect for busy professionals or anyone seeking an intuitive alarm experience

10 Alarm Sounds for Personalized Wake-Ups: Start your day with one of 10 alarm sounds. From gentle beeps to nature sounds, find the sound that suits your morning needs and wakes you up without harshness

competitors.description: Product Description The Dwyer Mark II 25 inclined differential manometer with red gauge fluid has a 0 to 3 inH2O measuring range, built in zero level and molded plastic case for monitoring air velocity and air filter performance, and taking pressure measurements above and below atmospheric pressure. Red gauge fluid is freeze-proof and has lower evaporation rate for use in cold environments, and produces expanded scale viewing for improved reading resolution. The built-in zero level provides linear calibration. The manometer has a styrene-acrylonitrile housing, indicating tube, and fluid wells for strength and durability. The molded ABS knobs and zero adjust plunger and shock-mounted glass level vial are wear-resistant. Leakproof O-ring seals and overflow tank reduce the risk of fluid loss. Scales are lithograph printed on aluminum to ease reading, and are epoxy coated to protect against wear. The manometer can be mounted on any vertical surface. SpecificationsPressure typesSingle and differentialMedia typeAirCase materialStyrene-acrylonitrileMeasuring range0 to 3 inH2OFluid typeRed gauge fluid, 0.826 sp. gr.MountStand and vertical mountAccuracy+ or - 3% full scaleMaximum pressure10 psi/70 kPaMaximum temperature140 degrees F/60 degrees CWeight1.04 lbs./472gDimensions5-29/32 x 7-13/32 x 2-1/4 inches (H x W x D) H is height, the vertical distance from the lowest to highest point; W is width, the horizontal distance from left to right; D is depth, the horizontal distance from front to back. Manometers measure the pressure of a liquid or gas. They are used in laboratory, medical equipment, engineering, automotive, and heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning applications. Manometers measure any combination of gauge, absolute, or differential pressures. Gauge pressure is the amount of pressure in a system relative to the ambient pressure, absolute pressure is the amount of pressure in a system relative to an absolute vacuum, and differential pressure is the difference between two pressures. Analog manometers are composed of columns of liquid, and they use gravity and the liquid's density to calculate pressure. Because they have no moving parts, analog manometers do not require re-calibration. Digital manometers have pressure sensors that are connected to a system with a hose to provide a digital readout of the amount of pressure present in a system. They use microprocessors to calculate pressure, and they require periodic calibration to help ensure accuracy.

competitors.description:
Features:

The brand new 6-pound hand truck is made of sturdy rustproof aluminum, with a telescoping handle that extends to 39 inches tall. As a result, both tall and short users can comfortably haul up to 165 pounds at once. Best of all, the truck folds up compactly for storage or carrying, with a footprint of only 24 inches tall and 2 inches wide. The hand truck's narrow profile makes it ideal for carrying on planes (it fits easily in overhead compartments), trains, and cars, and when you're not using it, simply hang it on a peg in the garage or stow it next to the fridge. you'll find many uses for this handy cart at home, work, and while traveling.

1. Color: Black

3. Maximum Load: 165.35 lbs (75kg)

8. Weight: 5.73 lbs (2.6kg)
9. Unfolding Dimensions: (39.37 x 15.75 x 15.35)" / (100 x 40 x 39)cm


Package Includes:

1 x Hand cart
1 x Bungee cord

Fashionable Design:Our handy cart with wheels is designed in in timely fashion,you can use them when you are shopping,travelling,moving boxes or storage containers,it can be used as a car seat carrier or luggage cart.
